Spring Data Redis

org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder

Packages that use RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.serializer
Serialization/Deserialization package for converting Object to (and from) binary data.

  • Uses of RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder in org.springframework.data.redis.serializer

    Method
    Description
    default RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder<K,V>

    Set the hash key RedisElementReader and RedisElementWriter.
    RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder<K,V>

    Set the hash key RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair.

    RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder.hashKey(RedisSerializer<?> serializer)
    Set the hash key RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair given a RedisSerializer.

    Creates a new RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder using a given default RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair.

    Creates a new RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder using a given default RedisSerializer.
